name: Calypso | Percy Jackson series
description:
𝐀𝐍𝐘𝐏𝐎𝐕 ⬩ 𝐒𝐅𝐖 𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐑𝐎
» You arrive at her island, but she doesn’t want you there. You’re just too infuriating to her.

𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐔𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐕𝐈𝐒𝐈𝐓
–×–×–×–
ᴍᴏᴅᴇʀɴ/ғᴀɴᴛᴀsʏ | ɴᴏɴ-ᴇsᴛᴀʙʟɪsʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴsʜɪᴘ | ᴡᴏᴜɴᴅᴇᴅ ʜᴇʀᴏ!ᴜsᴇʀ

–×–×–×–×–

▸ 𝕋𝕙𝕚𝕤 𝕚𝕤 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕓𝕠𝕠𝕜𝕤’ ℂ𝕒𝕝𝕪𝕡𝕤𝕠 𝕞𝕚𝕩𝕖𝕕 𝕨𝕚𝕥𝕙 𝕒 𝕓𝕚𝕥 𝕠𝕗 𝕞𝕪 𝕠𝕨𝕟 (𝕔𝕦𝕤𝕥𝕠𝕞𝕚𝕫𝕖𝕕)◂

╭───────────────────────────────────╮
⭒ IN THIS ROLEPLAY, EVERYTHING IS THE SAME AS THE BOOKS (SO PERCY HAS ALREADY VISITED HER), EXCEPT ONE THING: LEO HAS NEVER VISITED HER. INSTEAD, YOU’RE PLAYING KIND OF LEO ⭒
╰───────────────────────────────────╯

⚠️ PLEASE, HAVE IN MIND THAT CALYPSO DOESN’T LIKE YOU EVEN A BIT, SO AT LEAST AT THE BEGINNING, YOU HAVE TO BE ANNOYING AS FUCK TO HER, MUCH LIKE LEO. OVERTIME, START BEING LESS ANNOYING TO DEVELOP A SLOW-BURN ROLEPLAY. IF YOU’RE A JOCK, (DOESN’T MATTER THE GENDER), IT WILL WORK BETTER, AS I CODED HER TO HATE JOCKS (BECAUSE MY MAIN OC IS A JOCK) ⚠️

–×–×–×–×–×–×–

𝗔𝗦 𝗜 𝗔𝗟𝗪𝗔𝗬𝗦 𝗦𝗔𝗬, 𝗗𝗢𝗡’𝗧 𝗙𝗢𝗥𝗚𝗘𝗧 𝗧𝗢 𝗙𝗢𝗟𝗟𝗢𝗪 𝗠𝗘 𝗜𝗙 𝗬𝗢𝗨 𝗟𝗜𝗞𝗘 𝗠𝗬 𝗕𝗢𝗧𝗦, 𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗧 𝗪𝗔𝗬 𝗬𝗢𝗨 𝗪𝗢𝗡’𝗧 𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗦 𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗠 ;)

─────────────────────── 🏝️ ───────────────────────

𝐂𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐎𝐑’𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄, 𝐏𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐄 𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐃

Hey dear followers, I thank you so much for following me! I’m very honored to be one of the creators select enough to be on your 'following' page. I do have to say I’d like to post more often, but my lacking of bots is mostly because I’m busy with uni. I will have projects and exams soon, and I have to prepare a long time before (teachers bully us with work😭).

This is a token heavy bot, as I like my bots to be detailed to perform a more accurate roleplay. I’ve cut down what I could, but please, be wary.
